title: DAY 1: Foundations – Understanding AI & Setting Up Your Toolkit
objective: By the end of Day 1, you will understand what generative AI is, how it works, and have your essential AI tools set up and ready to use.

detailedContent.title: Generative AI – Your Creative Partner
detailedContent.content:
Generative AI creates new content (text, images, video) based on patterns from existing data. It's like a highly knowledgeable assistant that's read the entire internet.

**Key Concepts:**
- **Prompt:** Your instruction to the AI.
- **Tokens:** Units of text the AI processes.
- **Hallucination:** When AI confidently provides incorrect info.

detailedContent.title: Essential Toolkit
detailedContent.content:
Set up these free accounts:
- **ChatGPT/Claude:** For text and complex reasoning.
- **Leonardo.ai:** For high-quality image generation.
- **ElevenLabs:** For realistic voice manipulation.
- **Runway/CapCut:** For AI video creation.

detailedContent.title: Prompt Engineering Formula
detailedContent.content:
AI is only as good as your prompts. Use this formula:
`[Context] + [Task] + [Format] + [Tone] + [Constraints]`

video.title: ChatGPT Tutorial for Beginners
video.description: Kevin Stratvert covers the essential basics of prompting and interacting with modern LLMs.

exercises.title: Exercise 1: Account Setup (15 minutes)
steps: Create accounts on ChatGPT, Leonardo.ai, and Canva

exercises.title: Exercise 2: Basic vs. Advanced Prompting (15 minutes)
steps: Run a simple prompt: 'Give me 10 gardening video ideas'
Run a refined prompt: 'You are a professional gardener. Create 10 video ideas for beginners including titles and pro-tips'
Compare the depth and quality of the results

reflectionPrompt: What surprised me most about the difference between a simple and a refined prompt?

title: DAY 2: Text Generation – Writing with AI
objective: By the end of Day 2, you will be able to generate high-quality written content using advanced prompting techniques.

detailedContent.title: Advanced Prompting Techniques
detailedContent.content:
1. **Persona Prompting:** 'You are a seasoned copywriter...'.
2. **Few-Shot Prompting:** Give examples of the style you want first.
3. **Chain-of-Thought:** Ask the AI to 'Think step-by-step'.
4. **Iterative Refinement:** Treat the conversation as an evolving draft.

video.title: How to Write Blog Posts with AI
video.description: A practical workflow for using AI as a brainstorming partner and first-draft generator.

exercises.title: Exercise 1: Brainstorming (10 minutes)
steps: Use ChatGPT to generate 20 content ideas for your specific niche

exercises.title: Exercise 2: Multi-Format Repurposing (20 minutes)
steps: Generate a blog intro, then ask the AI to rewrite it as 3 Instagram captions and a short email newsletter

reflectionPrompt: How much time did AI save me in the brainstorming phase compared to doing it manually?

title: DAY 3: Image Generation – Creating Visuals with AI
objective: By the end of Day 3, you will be able to generate stunning images and integrate them into your content.

detailedContent.title: Turning Words Into Pictures
detailedContent.content:
AI image generators use diffusion models to refine noise into art.

**Anatomy of an Image Prompt:**
- **Subject:** What is it? (Golden retriever, futuristic car)
- **Details:** Actions, textures, lighting.
- **Style:** Photorealistic, Oil painting, 3D render.
- **Composition:** Cinematic, overhead, wide angle.

video.title: How to Use Leonardo AI
video.description: Learn to use one of the most powerful and accessible web-based image generators.

exercises.title: Exercise 1: Style Exploration (15 minutes)
steps: Generate the same subject (e.g., 'Mountain lake') in 4 different styles: Photorealistic, Anime, Sketch, and Cyberpunk

exercises.title: Exercise 2: Asset Creation (15 minutes)
steps: Create a professional flat-lay image for a social media background using specific lighting and mood keywords

reflectionPrompt: Which visual style felt most aligned with my personal brand or project needs?

title: DAY 4: Audio & Voice – Generating Voiceovers and Music
objective: By the end of Day 4, you will be able to create realistic voiceovers and original music tracks.

detailedContent.title: AI Gives Your Content a Voice
detailedContent.content:
Audio is half the experience. 
- **ElevenLabs:** Industry leader for text-to-speech with human-like emotion.
- **Suno/Udio:** Generate original, high-fidelity music from text descriptions.

**Best Practices:** Always check licenses for commercial use and be transparent when using synthetic voices for sensitive topics.

video.title: ElevenLabs Tutorial – Best AI Voice Generator
video.description: Master the settings for stability, clarity, and style to get the most natural narration.

exercises.title: Exercise 1: Voiceover Mastery (15 minutes)
steps: Generate a 3-sentence intro script using two different voices and compare the emotional tone

exercises.title: Exercise 2: Music Production (15 minutes)
steps: Use Suno to create a 30-second lo-fi back-track for a study video

reflectionPrompt: Did the AI voice sound human enough to fool me? Where could I use this in my current workflow?

title: DAY 5: Video Creation & Editing with AI
objective: By the end of Day 5, you will be able to generate video clips and use AI editing assistance.

detailedContent.title: AI Is Reshaping Video
detailedContent.content:
Video used to be the hardest format to master. Now:
- **Text-to-Video:** Generate short B-roll clips (Runway, Pika).
- **AI Editing:** Auto-captions, background removal, and 'Magic' transitions in tools like CapCut.
- **Talking Heads:** Presenters created from text (HeyGen).

video.title: Runway Gen-2 Tutorial
video.description: Learn to generate cinematic video clips from simple text prompts.

exercises.title: Exercise 1: B-Roll Generation (15 minutes)
steps: Generate a 4-second clip of a cinematic landscape or action sequence

exercises.title: Exercise 2: AI Editing (15 minutes)
steps: Use CapCut's auto-caption feature on a short video and refine the styling effortlessly

reflectionPrompt: What is the biggest limitation of AI video right now, and how can I work around it?

title: DAY 6: Workflow Integration – Repurposing & Automation
objective: By the end of Day 6, you will be able to build AI-powered workflows to maximize reach.

detailedContent.title: Work Smarter, Not Harder
detailedContent.content:
The real power is in the **Repurposing Funnel**:
1. Create a Core Asset (e.g., Long video).
2. AI Transcribes (CapCut).
3. AI Summarizes & Rewrites (ChatGPT) into tweets, blogs, and emails.
4. AI Visualizes (Leonardo) into thumbnails and quote cards.

video.title: AI Content Repurposing Workflow
video.description: Ryan Robinson demonstrates how to turn one podcast or video into 10+ pieces of content.

exercises.title: Exercise 1: The Funnel Test (20 minutes)
steps: Take a transcript of a 5-minute video and use AI to generate 5 tweets and 1 LinkedIn post

exercises.title: Exercise 2: Visual Repurposing (10 minutes)
steps: Create a quote card image using a key insight from your transcript

reflectionPrompt: How many hours a week could I save if I automated my content repurposing?

title: DAY 7: Final Project – Multi-Format AI Content Package
objective: By the end of Day 7, you will have created a complete content package using multiple AI tools.

detailedContent.title: The Grand Finale
detailedContent.content:
**Project Requirements:**
- 1 Long-form article (Text AI).
- 3 Social Media posts (Repurposed).
- 1 Custom Image (Image AI).
- 1 Short Video/Voiceover clip (Video/Audio AI).
- 1 Email Newsletter (Drafted by AI).

Consistency across formats is the goal. Use AI to maintain the same voice and style throughout.

video.title: AI Content Creation – Full Project Workflow
video.description: A start-to-finish demonstration of creating a complete campaign using only AI tools.

exercises.title: Exercise 1: The Master Campaign (90+ minutes)
steps: Execute the full content plan for a single topic
Assemble all pieces into a single showcase folder

reflectionPrompt: Compare your perspective on AI from Day 1 to now. How has your 'creative partner' changed your process?
